description_long: This bungalow features a pitched gable roof with gray shingles and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The exterior walls are finished in a muted pink brick, complemented by white trim around the windows and doors. A low stone wall encloses the property, with a driveway leading up to the front gate and a yellow car parked outside. The front yard includes a small lawn area and a covered porch with outdoor furniture, while the side and rear yards are landscaped with bushes and trees. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with additional windows on the sides and rear for natural light. The overall design is reminiscent of a Craftsman-style bungalow, emphasizing comfort and curb appeal.
description: A pink brick bungalow with a gable roof, white trim, and a covered front porch, surrounded by a low stone wall and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and yellow car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pink brick wall, gable roof, and a glimpse of the backyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch area, large trees, and the enclosed yard with stone wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, window, and continuation of the stone wall and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
